violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed wearing jewelry on arms and hands during food preparation.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth used for prep table cleaning not being stored in sanitizer between uses.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. East hand sink not provided with soap dispenser.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. East hand sink not provided with paper towel dispenser.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk in freezer floors have a build up of ffod debris and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor in East walk in freezer cracked and shifting. Wall cracking as well.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Storage shelving and speed racks have an accumulation of debris and need cleaning. Cabinets need cleaning.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Replace removed hand sink on East side of kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs cleaning in walk in units and under equipment and prep tables in bakery kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
